summary: A unit test failed during the ':hibernate-core:test' Gradle task: DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion failed with an assertion that the owner version was incremented unexpectedly.
root_cause: The test DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion failed with an assertion: "owner version not incremented ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>", causing the ':hibernate-core:test' task to fail.

evidence.reason: Identifies the exact test that failed.

evidence.quote: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: owner version not incremented ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>
evidence.reason: Shows the assertion error and the expected vs actual values that caused the test to fail.
Indicates the Gradle task that failed because of the test failure.

evidence.quote: There were failing tests. See the report at: file:///home/runner/work/hibernate-orm/hibernate-orm/hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html
evidence.reason: Points to the test report with details for the failing test.
Confirms the overall build failed as a result of the test failure.

suggested_fix: Open the test report at file:///home/runner/work/hibernate-orm/hibernate-orm/hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html to see the full failure details, then run the failing test locally (for example: gradle :hibernate-core:test --tests "DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion") to reproduce. Investigate why the owner version was incremented (compare expected vs actual state changes) and either fix the code that increments the owner version or update the test expectation if the new behavior is correct.
